items.name: User Dashboard
items.description: Authenticated user area with content management, API key management, account settings, and activity overview.

items.name: Workspace Settings
items.description: Team workspace configuration including general settings, member management, permissions, and billing.

items.name: VOD Review
items.description: Auxiliary esports VOD review surface for browsing a library of match recordings and annotating frames with coaching notes and timestamps.

items.name: Webhook Manager
items.description: Webhook endpoint configuration, event filtering, delivery monitoring, and retry management for platform integrations.

items.name: Workspace Home
items.description: Dashboard for collaborative workspace with recent documents, shared items, and activity feed. Landing page after login.

items.name: AI Video Editor
items.description: Core timeline-based editing workspace for AI-generated video projects. Combines multi-track timeline, scene storyboard, and render queue for end-to-end video production.

items.name: Workbench Inspector
items.description: Property inspector and live preview for the design-system workbench. Editable form sections for component properties with real-time preview in split-pane layout.

items.name: Workbench
items.description: Developer workbench and IDE-like application with split-pane workspace, file browser, document editor, terminal, and settings.

items.name: Workbench Core
items.description: Multi-panel IDE workspace with split-pane layout, command palette, and component detail view. The primary workspace for design system power users.

items.name: Workbench Catalog
items.description: Component and pattern catalog browser for the design-system workbench. Browsable grid with instant search, detail views with JSON inspection.

items.name: Track Library
items.description: Producer track catalog with searchable table of finished and in-progress tracks plus a per-track detail view with waveform preview and version history.

items.name: Ticket Checkout
items.description: Ticket selection and checkout flow for events. Guides users through tier selection, attendee info, and payment in a focused, distraction-free interface.

items.name: Terminal Home
items.description: Main terminal dashboard view with split panes, log streaming, metrics, and command input. Core interface for CLI-style developer tools.

items.name: Tenant Payments
items.description: Tenant payment management including rent reminders, payment history, and autopay setup configuration.

items.name: Tool Registry
items.description: Centralized registry of agent tools with JSON schema editing, interactive test playground, and usage analytics.

items.name: Trace Explorer
items.description: Distributed tracing viewer with trace search, latency histograms, full waterfall visualization, and service topology mapping.

items.name: Sponsor Dashboard
items.description: Auxiliary esports sponsor surface for managing brand partnerships, tracking deal value, impressions, and activation metrics across sponsors.

items.name: Team Workspace
items.description: Team member management and permission configuration. Data table of members with role badges and a permission matrix for fine-grained access control.

items.name: Usage & Billing
items.description: Usage metering dashboard, plan management, payment configuration, and invoice history for consumption-based SaaS billing.

items.name: Transaction History
items.description: Financial transaction ledger with filterable data tables, sparkline trend indicators, and transaction detail views.
